hero.subtitle: Your Zdrofit community: sell, buy, find gym buddies and enjoy your workouts! 💪
hero.imgAlt: Person breaking free from contract chains
pain.title: Sound familiar? 😩
pain.3: Paying for a gym you don't use

solution.sell.title: Transfer easily
solution.sell.text: List your membership for sale, find a buyer and forget about payments.
solution.buy.title: Buy flexibly
solution.buy.text: Need a membership for a couple of months? We have options without long-term commitments.
steps.title: Just 3 steps! 🚀
steps.1.title: Open Telegram
steps.1.text: Find ZdrofitBuddy or tap the button.
steps.2.title: List / Browse
steps.2.text: Add your membership or browse available ones.
steps.3.title: Connect & Go
steps.3.text: Get in touch, transfer and enjoy your freedom!
beyond.title: But that's not all! With us you... 🔥
beyond.1: Find a gym buddy right from your gym!
beyond.3: Always stay up-to-date with fresh memes and life hacks!
cta.subtitle: It's fast, free and will save you from unnecessary problems!
